summary: Enthusiastic fan recollection with a five‑star rating but no concrete details on sound or performance
review: The reviewer describes an almost mythic experience surrounding the concert, calling it "magic" and giving it a five‑star rating. No specific comments are made about the audio source, mix quality, individual songs, or band members, so the technical and musical merits of this recording remain unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review; sentiment is clearly positive but lacks detail on performance or recording quality, limiting confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention any aspects of sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific information about set structure or song performance was provided.
